PowerShell($auth = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\dzeni\\AppData\\Roaming\\com.vercel.cli\\Data\\auth.json" | ConvertFrom-Json; $token = $auth.token; if \(-not $token\) { $auth | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 } else { Write-Host "Token length: $\($token.Length\)" })

PowerShell($token = \(Get-Content "C:\\Users\\dzeni\\AppData\\Roaming\\com.vercel.cli\\Data\\auth.json" | ConvertFrom-Json\).token; $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token" }; $teamId = "team_zKUrJ3hUjFQV5thmVR1bdLpR"; $cfg = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.vercel.com/v6/domains/tirgus.izipizi.lv/config?teamId=$teamId" -Headers $headers -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $cfg | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6; Write-Host "---"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://tirgus.izipizi.lv" -Method Head -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction Stop; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Headers["server"] } catch { "HTTPS request: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($f = "C:\\Users\\dzeni\\Downloads\\app.izipiziapp.com \(1\).zip"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\($f\); $zip.Entries | ForEach-Object { $parts = $_.FullName -split '/'; if \($parts.Length -ge 2\) { $parts[0..1] -join '/' } } | Sort-Object -Unique | Select-Object -First 60; $zip.Dispose\(\))

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://tirgus-izipizi.vercel.app/catalog" -UseBasicParsing; $html = $r.Content; "First 1000 chars of body content:"; $bodyStart = $html.IndexOf\('<main'\); if \($bodyStart -lt 0\) { $bodyStart = $html.IndexOf\('<body'\) }; if \($bodyStart -ge 0\) { $html.Substring\($bodyStart,[math]::Min\(3000,$html.Length-$bodyStart\)\) } else { "no <main> found"; $html.Substring\(0,1500\) })

PowerShell($env:PATH = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;$env:APPDATA\\npm;$env:PATH"; $output = & "node_modules\\.bin\\tsc.cmd" --noEmit -p tsconfig.json 2>&1; $myErrors = $output | Select-String -Pattern "^\(app|components|lib\)" -CaseSensitive; if \($myErrors\) { "MY FILE ERRORS:"; $myErrors } else { "No errors in app/components/lib code" }; "---"; "Total error lines: $\(\($output | Select-String 'error TS'\).Count\)")

PowerShell($env:PATH = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;$env:APPDATA\\npm;$env:PATH"; $output = & "node_modules\\.bin\\tsc.cmd" --noEmit -p tsconfig.json 2>&1; $myErrors = $output | Select-String -Pattern "^\(app|components|lib\)" -CaseSensitive; if \($myErrors\) { "MY FILE ERRORS:"; $myErrors } else { "[OK] No TS errors in app/components/lib" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/catalog" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\), Size: $\([math]::Round\($r.RawContentLength/1KB,1\)\)KB"; $html = $r.Content; if \($html -match 'Brīvības iela 253'\) { "[WARN] Old locker name still in page \(may be in DeliveryChoice on listing pages, OK if absent from card\)" } else { "[OK] Old locker info gone" }; if \($html -match 'no Suntaži|no Rīga|no Vidzemes'\) { "[OK] New seller location format rendered" } elseif \($html -match 'BAILOUT_TO_CLIENT'\) { "[INFO] Catalog SSR bails to client; check via JS hydration" } else { "[CHECK] Need to verify in browser" }; if \($html -match '🏠 Mājas'\) { "[FAIL] Old 'Mājas' badge still present" } else { "[OK] 'Mājas' badge removed" } } catch { "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($env:PATH = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;$env:APPDATA\\npm;$env:PATH"; $output = & "node_modules\\.bin\\tsc.cmd" --noEmit -p tsconfig.json 2>&1; $myErrors = $output | Select-String -Pattern "^\(app|components|lib\)" -CaseSensitive; if \($myErrors\) { "ERRORS:"; $myErrors } else { "[OK] TypeScript clean" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/catalog" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $html = $r.Content; "Old format 'Rīga · Brīvības iela 253' count: $\(\([regex]::Matches\($html,'Rīga · Brīvības iela 253'\)\).Count\)"; "Old format 'city · name' card pattern count: $\(\([regex]::Matches\($html,'\\w+ · [A-ZĀČĒĢĪĶĻŅŠŪŽ][a-zāčēģīķļņšūž ]+\\d'\)\).Count\)"; "New format 'no Suntaži|no Rīga|no Vidzemes|no Pierīgas' count: $\(\([regex]::Matches\($html,'no \(Suntaži|Rīga|Vidzemes novads|Pierīgas novads\)'\)\).Count\)"; "Mājas badge count: $\(\([regex]::Matches\($html,'🏠 Mājas'\)\).Count\)" } catch { "ERR: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/catalog" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $html = $r.Content; "Search 'no Suntaži': $\(\([regex]::Matches\($html,'no Suntaži'\)\).Count\)"; "Search 'no Rīga': $\(\([regex]::Matches\($html,'no Rīga'\)\).Count\)"; "Search 'Suntaži': $\(\([regex]::Matches\($html,'Suntaži'\)\).Count\)"; "Search 'Rīga' total: $\(\([regex]::Matches\($html,'Rīga'\)\).Count\)"; "Search 'Vidzemes': $\(\([regex]::Matches\($html,'Vidzemes'\)\).Count\)"; "Sample around first MapPin svg ic:"; $idx = $html.IndexOf\('lucide-map-pin'\); if \($idx -gt 0\) { $html.Substring\([math]::Max\(0,$idx-50\),[math]::Min\(400,$html.Length-$idx\)\) } } catch { "ERR: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/catalog" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $html = $r.Content; "Search 'Cake Break' \(find a card\):"; $idx = $html.IndexOf\('Cake Break'\); if \($idx -gt 0\) { $sample = $html.Substring\($idx, [math]::Min\(800, $html.Length-$idx\)\); $sample } else { 'Cake Break not found' } } catch { "ERR: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/catalog" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $html = $r.Content; "Looking for first /listing/ anchor and content:"; $m = [regex]::Match\($html,'[\\s\\S]{0,2500}?'\); if \($m.Success\) { $card = $m.Value; $card.Substring\(0, [math]::Min\(2200, $card.Length\)\) } else { "no card found" } } catch { "ERR: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/catalog" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $html = $r.Content; "Locate first /listing/ link and 1500 chars after:"; $idx = $html.IndexOf\('href="/listing/'\); if \($idx -gt 0\) { $html.Substring\($idx, [math]::Min\(1800, $html.Length-$idx\)\) } else { 'No /listing/ link found' } } catch { "ERR: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/catalog" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $html = $r.Content; "Find first lucide-map-pin AFTER first /listing/ link:"; $listingIdx = $html.IndexOf\('href="/listing/'\); $mapIdx = $html.IndexOf\('lucide-map-pin', $listingIdx\); if \($mapIdx -gt 0\) { "Distance from listing link: $\($mapIdx - $listingIdx\)"; "Context \(200 chars after MapPin svg close\):"; $svgEnd = $html.IndexOf\('</svg>', $mapIdx\); $html.Substring\($svgEnd, [math]::Min\(400, $html.Length-$svgEnd\)\) } } catch { "ERR: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/catalog" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $html = $r.Content; $matches_loc = [regex]::Matches\($html, 'truncate">no \([^<]+\)'\); $locs = $matches_loc | ForEach-Object { $_.Groups[1].Value } | Group-Object | Sort-Object Count -Descending; "Tirgotāju izcelsmes uz kartiņām:"; $locs | ForEach-Object { " {0,4}× no {1}" -f $_.Count, $_.Name } } catch { "ERR: $_" })

PowerShell($urls = @\("https://tirgus-izipizi.vercel.app/","https://tirgus-izipizi-dzenisrolands-7290s-projects.vercel.app/"\); foreach \($u in $urls\) { "=== $u ==="; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15 -MaximumRedirection 0; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\), Size: $\([math]::Round\($r.RawContentLength/1KB,1\)\)KB"; if \($r.Content -match 'Tavs.{0,80}galds'\) { "[OK] New H1 live" } else { "[FAIL] H1 not new" }; if \($r.Content -match 'no Krimulda|no Sigulda|no Melnsils|no Suntaži'\) { "[OK] New locations live" } else { "[FAIL] Locations stale" } } catch { "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; "" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://tirgus-izipizi.vercel.app/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; $html = $r.Content; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($html -match 'izipizi.lv tīkls' -or $html -match 'Sūtīt' -or $html -match 'Termo Pakomāts'\) { "[OK] izipizi network bar live" } else { "[CHECK] Network bar may not be visible — checking for individual links"; if \($html -match 'Termo Pakomāts'\) { "[OK] Termo Pakomāts found" }; if \($html -match 'Franšīze'\) { "[OK] Franšīze found" } } } catch { "ERR: $_" })

PowerShell($html = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://tirgus.izipizi.lv/" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; $matches_count = \([regex]::Matches\($html, 'class="line-clamp-1 text-xs font-bold leading-tight text-white"'\)\).Count; "Rotator product slots: $matches_count")

PowerShell($headers = @{ "apikey" = "sb_publishable_BMqu4RvrA4cl72OJQQakLA_8Amc2F8-"; "Authorization" = "Bearer sb_publishable_BMqu4RvrA4cl72OJQQakLA_8Amc2F8-" }; $url = "https://wepyslyqcxpszobfkzzs.supabase.co/rest/v1/listings?select=id,title,image_url,status,created_at&status=eq.active&order=created_at.desc&limit=20"; $rows = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $url -Headers $headers; "Active listings \(top 20 newest\):"; $rows | ForEach-Object { $img = if \($_.image_url\) { "OK" } else { "MISSING" }; "{0} | {1} | {2}" -f $_.created_at.Substring\(0,10\), $img, $_.title })

PowerShell($html = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://tirgus.izipizi.lv/" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; "Page size: $\($html.Length\) bytes"; $rotatorTitles = [regex]::Matches\($html, 'class="line-clamp-1 text-xs font-bold leading-tight text-white">\([^<]+\)<'\); "Rotator products SSR: $\($rotatorTitles.Count\)"; $rotatorTitles | ForEach-Object { "  - " + $_.Groups[1].Value })

PowerShell($html = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://tirgus-izipizi.vercel.app/" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; "Page size: $\($html.Length\) bytes"; $titles = [regex]::Matches\($html, 'class="line-clamp-1 text-xs font-bold leading-tight text-white">\([^<]+\)<'\); "Rotator products SSR: $\($titles.Count\)"; $titles | ForEach-Object { "  - " + $_.Groups[1].Value })

PowerShell($html = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://tirgus-izipizi.vercel.app/" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; $rotMatches = [regex]::Matches\($html, '"sellerName"'\); "Total products serialized to rotator \(sellerName count\): $\($rotMatches.Count\)")

PowerShell($html = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://tirgus-izipizi.vercel.app/" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; $austerCount = [regex]::Matches\($html, 'Austeres Super Speciale|Austeres Mini|AUSTERU NAZIS|MĒRCE AUSTERĒM|Austeres Speciale|Austeres Fine'\).Count; "Austeres-related strings in HTML: $austerCount"; $idsInRotator = [regex]::Matches\($html, '"id":"[a-f0-9-]{36}"'\).Count; "UUID-shaped id strings: $idsInRotator")

PowerShell($headers = @{ "apikey" = "sb_publishable_BMqu4RvrA4cl72OJQQakLA_8Amc2F8-"; "Authorization" = "Bearer sb_publishable_BMqu4RvrA4cl72OJQQakLA_8Amc2F8-"; "Prefer" = "count=exact" }; $url = "https://wepyslyqcxpszobfkzzs.supabase.co/rest/v1/listings?select=id&status=eq.active&image_url=not.is.null&limit=1"; $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -Headers $headers -UseBasicParsing; $contentRange = $resp.Headers["Content-Range"]; "Real DB active listings with image: $contentRange")

PowerShell($base = "https://tirgus-izipizi.vercel.app"; foreach \($u in @\("/admin/statistika", "/api/pwa/event"\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base$u" -UseBasicParsing -Method Head -SkipHttpErrorCheck; "{0,-25} {1}" -f $u, $r.StatusCode } catch { "{0,-25} ERR" -f $u } })

PowerShell($base = "https://tirgus-izipizi.vercel.app"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/admin/statistika" -UseBasicParsing; "/admin/statistika $\($r.StatusCode\) \($\($r.Content.Length\) bytes\)" } catch { "/admin/statistika error: $\($_.Exception.Message\) status=$\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/api/pwa/event" -UseBasicParsing -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"type":"prompt_shown"}'; "/api/pwa/event POST $\($r.StatusCode\) body=$\($r.Content\)" } catch { "/api/pwa/event error: $\($_.Exception.Message\) status=$\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" })

PowerShell($base = "https://tirgus-izipizi.vercel.app"; foreach \($q in @\("piens", "olas", "siers", "Bujums"\)\) { try { $html = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/catalog?q=$q" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; $count = if \($html -match '\(\\d+\)\\s+produkti'\) { $matches[1] } else { '?' }; "/catalog?q=$q  -> $count produkti" } catch { "/catalog?q=$q  ERR" } })

PowerShell($html = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://tirgus-izipizi.vercel.app/catalog?q=piens" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; if \($html -match '>\(\\d+\)\\s+produkti<'\) { "produkti count for q=piens: $\($matches[1]\)" } else { "no match" }; if \($html -match 'Mekl\(?:ēts|ets\):'\) { "search chip rendered: yes" } else { "search chip rendered: no" })

PowerShell($base = "https://tirgus-izipizi.vercel.app"; foreach \($q in @\("piens","austeres","Bujums","speķis"\)\) { $html = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/catalog?q=$q" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; $start = $html.IndexOf\("<title>"\); $end = $html.IndexOf\("</title>"\); $cards = \([regex]::Matches\($html, '/listing/[a-zA-Z0-9-]+'\)\).Count; "/catalog?q=$q  -> $cards listing links rendered" })

PowerShell($base = "https://tirgus-izipizi.vercel.app"; $html = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/catalog" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; $cards = \([regex]::Matches\($html, '/listing/[a-zA-Z0-9-]+'\)\).Count; "/catalog \(no query\)  -> $cards listing links"; $count = [regex]::Match\($html, '\(\\d+\)\\s+produkti'\); "produkti count text: $\($count.Groups[1].Value\)")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://tirgus-izipizi.vercel.app/catalog?q=siers" -UseBasicParsing; $hasFallback = $r.Content -match 'fallback|Suspense'; $hasGrid = $r.Content -match 'class="grid'; "fallback marker: $hasFallback, grid in HTML: $hasGrid"; \($r.Content | Select-String 'Visi produkti'\).Matches.Count)

PowerShell($urls = @\("https://tirgus-izipizi.vercel.app/catalog", "https://tirgus-izipizi.vercel.app/catalog?q=siers", "https://tirgus-izipizi.vercel.app/catalog?q=zzznonexistent", "https://tirgus-izipizi.vercel.app/catalog?q=ga%C4%BCa"\); foreach \($u in $urls\) { Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -UseBasicParsing; $count = \([regex]::Matches\($r.Content, 'href="/listing/[^"]+"'\)\).Count; "$count listing links · $u" })

PowerShell($body = '{"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"sveiks"}]}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://tirgus-izipizi.vercel.app/api/assistant" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "$\($r.StatusCode\): $\($r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(200, $r.Content.Length\)\)\)" } catch { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; if \($_.Exception.Response\) { "Status: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\)" } })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $body = '{"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Sveiks! Izsauc tool list_categories un atgriez 3 lielākās kategorijas."}]}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://tirgus-izipizi.vercel.app/api/assistant" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "$\($r.StatusCode\):"; $r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(2000, $r.Content.Length\)\) } catch { "Error $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\): $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $body = '{"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Meklēju sieru"}]}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://tirgus-izipizi.vercel.app/api/assistant" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "$\($r.StatusCode\):"; \($r.Content -split "`n`n"\) | Select-Object -First 8 } catch { "Error $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\): $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
